description: Platform 3.0 Use Cases for Benchmarking - Includes prompts and expected files

use_cases.name: MS Teams Presence Checker
use_cases.prompt: Please build a Freshservice front-end application (ticket_sidebar) that has a button "Get status" which, when clicked, uses the requester's email address to get their presence on Microsoft Teams using the Microsoft Graph API and displays the result.

use_cases.name: Freshservice-Asana Sync
use_cases.prompt: Track Ticket Progress: The app synchronizes comments and updates between Freshservice tickets and Asana tasks.

use_cases.name: Freshdesk-GitHub Integration
use_cases.prompt: Create a Freshdesk-GitHub integration that enables users to create GitHub issues directly from Freshdesk tickets and fetch issue lists on-demand.

use_cases.name: Password Generator with PWPush
use_cases.prompt: In Freshservice, I want a passporter app available in every ticket. Clicking "Random Password" should generate a 12-character string, create a secure URL using pwpush.com, and display it in an internal note.

use_cases.name: Freshdesk-Zapier Contact Sync
use_cases.prompt: Create a freshdesk app to regularly synchronize contacts with Zapier

use_cases.name: Jira-Freshdesk OAuth Sync
use_cases.prompt: Create an oauth app to sync jira tickets with freshdesk or freshservice tickets with mapping between the two systems configurable during installation

use_cases.name: Ticket Field Validation
use_cases.prompt: I want an app that prevents agents from replying to a ticket unless a required ticket field (e.g., "Type") is set.
